title: TNT Visualizer
description: Shows TNT and dripstone trajectories, adds a custom explosion timer, and more!
body:
TNT Visualizer allows you to see predicted TNT and dripstone trajectories, as well as potential TNT rodding trajectories, making practicing with TNT easier!

Configure with /tnttoggle:
- trajectory - toggle regular TNT trajectories
- trajectory_rod - toggle TNT rodding trajectories
- positioning - experimental rodding positioning helper feature (beta)
- explosionrange - shows tnt blocks that are close enough to a tnt entity to be activated

Original concept by nedraw_
